summary: GharSetu Iteration 7 - All requested features verified and working. Fixed payment API bug. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All features working.

fixed.issue: Bug fixed - user_id was receiving user dict instead of string
fixed.fix_applied: Changed 'user_id = await get_current_user(credentials)' to 'user = await get_current_user(credentials); user_id = user["id"]'

passed_tests: Video structure verification: PASSED (all required fields present)
User profile with follower count: PASSED
Payment config: PASSED (enabled=true, razorpay key configured)
Create payment order: PASSED (after bug fix)
- Follow button (+): PRESENT on owner avatar
- Upload button (hidden for logged out): CORRECT
- Hidden contact info: 'Contact owner via chat only. Phone/Email not shared for security.'
- 5% platform fee calculation: VERIFIED in code
critical_code_review_comments: Payment API bug has been FIXED - both create-order and verify endpoints now work correctly
All Instagram-style Reels features implemented correctly (Like/Save/Share/Follow)
DirectChat is WhatsApp-style with no call/video buttons as required
Contact info hidden on listing pages - only chat option available
5% platform fee correctly implemented in PaymentModal
Mobile responsive design working on 390px viewport
test_credentials: Multiple test users created during testing
seed_data_creation: Test users created for follow/chat/payment tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified and working. Payment API bug fixed. Video upload uses demo URL fallback when Cloudinary not fully configured (MOCKED). Razorpay test keys configured and working.

Reels_Instagram_Style.details: Like/Save/Share/Follow buttons, video counter, navigation, upload button (auth required)

Upload_Button_Auth.details: Upload button only visible for authenticated users

Hidden_Contact_Info.details: No phone/email shown on listing pages, only chat option

Platform_Fee_5_Percent.details: 5% platform fee calculated and displayed in payment modal

Mobile_Responsive.details: Homepage, Reels, Listing pages all responsive on mobile (390px)

Video_Upload_API.details: Endpoint exists, uses demo video URL when Cloudinary not configured

mocked_apis.video_upload: Uses demo video URL (vimeo) when Cloudinary credentials not fully configured

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: get_current_user returns user dict, but code was treating it as user_id string
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Changed to: user = await get_current_user(credentials); user_id = user['id']
